message:
feat(node): add memory tail-risk guardrail with empirical-Bernstein bounds

Implement MemoryTailRiskGuardrail in guardrail_monitor.rs using empirical-
Bernstein concentration bounds for tail-risk estimation. Add
MemoryTailRiskTelemetry struct for observability and new memory_tail_risk
field on SystemState. Update decision_engine.rs test fixtures with the
new SystemState field initialization.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
